description: Start a synthetic Cyton board session in the OpenBCI GUI and configure the hardware gain settings for an Auditory Evoked Potential (AEP) protocol. Set the PGA Gain for Channels 1 and 2 to 12x, Channels 3 through 6 to 24x, and Channels 7 and 8 to 8x. Save a screenshot of the configuration to ~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/gain_config.png and create a text report listing these settings at ~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/gain_report.txt.
